goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'efes restaurant'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '12:00' on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
The train should 'arrive by 20:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called efes restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 12:00 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should go to stansted airport
The train should arrive by 20:30 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
